title: AppState struct and egui render skeleton
description:
## Why
The UI needs a place to hold all mutable state and a render pass to display it.

## What
- AppState struct: session info, chat list, selected chat id, messages for selected chat, contacts map, input buffer, connection status, typing indicators map, presence map
- eframe App impl with update() calling render helpers
- Three-panel layout: chat list (left), message view (centre), compose bar (bottom)
- Status bar (top): server URL, owner identity, connection status
- Renders placeholder/empty state cleanly with no panics
close_reason: Superseded; replaced by issues under jmap-chat-tui-s2e (egui) and new TUI epic
